name: GetStudentCourses
bodySql:
SELECT e.id, c.name AS course_name, e.semester, e.year, e.grade
FROM enrollments e
INNER JOIN courses c ON c.id = e.course_id
WHERE e.student_id = @studentId
  AND e.semester = @semester
  AND e.year = @year
ORDER BY c.name;
description: Lists a student's course enrollments for a semester and year.

name: RecordAttendance
description: Creates an attendance record and returns the inserted row.
